description: Shared active Tier 0 quality batch for the current agent-acceptance repository. Used by local-quality and temporarily reused by recovery/release/cleanup queues until specialized active batches are restored.

tasks.title: Compile core governance scripts
tasks.command: python -m py_compile tools/ai_guard.py tools/go_evidence.py scripts/validate_workflow_closure.py scripts/validate_paper_task.py scripts/memory_compiler.py scripts/memory_lint.py
